reading.title: Reading: Records and statistics
reading.passage: Fansipan is the highest mountain in Vietnam. Ho Chi Minh City has the largest population in the country. The traffic there is the busiest I have ever seen, but the people are some of the friendliest too.

questions.question: Fansipan is the highest mountain in Vietnam.
questions.explanation: Câu đầu nêu rõ điều này.

questions.question: Which city has the largest population?
questions.explanation: "Ho Chi Minh City has the largest population in the country."

reading.title: Reading: Similar but not the same
reading.passage: My hometown isn't as crowded as the capital, but it's growing fast. It's quite similar to other small towns nearby. It is common for students here to work part-time, but it isn't as common for first-year students.

questions.question: The hometown is as crowded as the capital.
questions.explanation: "My hometown isn't as crowded as the capital".

questions.question: It is common for first-year students to work part-time.
questions.explanation: "it isn't as common for first-year students."
